articles.author: Jonathan J. Cooper, Humera Lodhi, Simran Parwani
articles.title: Takeaways from Indiana, Ohio and Michigan: Trump's flex pays off and Democrats win special election - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump is having some success in his latest attempt to politically punish Republicans who stand in his way. In Indiana, five of the seven state senators targeted by Trump lost their primaries on Tuesday. One was victorious, and one race was to…
articles.content: Elections in Indiana, Ohio and Michigan on Tuesday reinforced a picture thats becoming increasingly clear while President Donald Trump still dominates the Republican Party, Democrats seem to have the… [+5128 chars]
